infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: KaytiPic needs camera access for photo capture and AI analysis
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: KaytiPic needs photo library access to import and save photos
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: KaytiPic needs location access to show nearby photo spots and events
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: KaytiPic needs microphone access for voice input and video recording
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: KaytiPic uses speech recognition so you can talk to your AI photo coach

plugins.cameraPermission: KaytiPic a besoin de l'appareil photo pour capturer et analyser vos photos.

plugins.photosPermission: KaytiPic a besoin d'accéder à vos photos pour les analyser et les retoucher.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: KaytiPic utilise votre position pour trouver les spots photo autour de vous.

plugins.microphonePermission: KaytiPic a besoin du micro pour la saisie vocale avec votre coach photo.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: KaytiPic utilise la reconnaissance vocale pour vos échanges avec le coach IA.
